allow: Bash(Rscript -e "load\(''data/soils.RData''\); cat\(''Class:'', class\(soils\), ''\\n''\); cat\(''Names:'', paste\(names\(soils\), collapse='', ''\), ''\\n''\); cat\(''Rows:'', nrow\(soils\), ''\\n''\); cat\(''Unique gridcodes:'', paste\(sort\(unique\(soils$gridcode\)\), collapse='', ''\), ''\\n''\); cat\(''CRS:'', st_crs\(soils\)$epsg, ''\\n''\)")
